entries.en-US: These slash-entry shims are no longer loaded by the default plugin command surface.
entries.zh-Hans: 这些斜杠命令适配层已不再由默认插件命令界面加载。

entries.en-US: They remain here for users who still need short-term migration compatibility with old muscle-memory commands such as `/tdd`, `/eval`, or `/verify`.
entries.zh-Hans: 它们保留在此处，供仍需要与旧版肌肉记忆命令（如 `/tdd`、`/eval` 或 `/verify`）进行短期迁移兼容的用户使用。

entries.en-US: Prefer the canonical skills or maintained commands referenced inside each shim. If you need one of these shims locally, copy the individual Markdown file into your project-level or user-level Claude commands directory instead of enabling the full archive by default.
entries.zh-Hans: 请优先使用每个适配层内部引用的规范技能或维护中的命令。若需在本地使用某个适配层，请将对应的 Markdown 文件复制到项目级或用户级的 Claude 命令目录中，而非默认启用整个存档。
